mapper.select: select i.business_type, i.business_key, i.form_data as form_data_str, i.flow_id, f.flow_name, i.status, f.ent_code, e.ent_name, i.current_node_id, n.node_name as current_node_name, i.current_assignee, u1.user_name as current_assignee_name, i.initiator, u2.user_name as initiator_name, i.create_time, i.update_time from t_bas_approval_instance i left join t_bas_approval_flow f on f.flow_id = i.flow_id left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = f.ent_code left join t_bas_approval_node n on n.node_id = i.current_node_id left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = i.current_assignee left join sys_user u2 on u2.user_id = i.initiator where i.business_type = #{businessType} and i.business_key = #{businessKey}
select business_type as type, count(business_key) as num from t_bas_approval_instance where status = #{status} and current_assignee = #{userId} group by business_type
mapper.insert:
insert into t_bas_approval_instance
business_type, business_key, form_data, flow_id, status, current_node_id, current_assignee, initiator,
#{businessType}, #{businessKey}, #{formDataStr}, #{flowId}, #{status}, #{currentNodeId}, #{currentAssignee}, #{initiator},

insert into t_bas_approval_history
business_type, business_key, action_type, action_user, action_time, comment, node_id, ip_address, action_location, browser, os,
#{businessType}, #{businessKey}, #{actionType}, #{actionUser}, #{actionTime}, #{comment}, #{nodeId}, #{ipAddress}, #{actionLocation}, #{browser}, #{os},
mapper.select: select i.status, i.current_assignee as currentAssignee, n1.node_id as nodeId, n2.node_id as nextNodeId, n2.assignee_user as nextAssignee from t_bas_approval_instance i inner join t_bas_approval_node n1 on n1.node_id = i.current_node_id left join t_bas_approval_node n2 on n2.node_id = n1.next_node_id where i.business_type = #{businessType} and i.business_key = #{businessKey} limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into t_bas_approval_message (history_id, push_user, message_content, push_status, push_time, max_retries, retry_interval) values
(#{historyId}, #{item.pushUser}, #{item.messageContent}, #{item.pushStatus}, #{item.pushTime}, #{item.maxRetries}, #{item.retryInterval})
